violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Vents in the coolers have black bacteria growth on them.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil * was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Cutting boards are being stabbed and are no longer easily cleanable.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer bottles not labeled properly
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. Rotisserie oven dirty.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item * was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - Single use food containers not in its original packaging protecting it from dust. Paint found on a few of them.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
